ul.li: CLOSED: No TCB, no connection exists.
LISTEN: Server is waiting for an incoming connection.
SYN_SENT: Active open initiated; waiting for matching SYN.
SYN_RCVD: Received SYN; acknowledged and sent own SYN.
ESTABLISHED: Handshake complete; data transfer can occur.
FIN_WAIT_1: Local application closed; FIN segment sent.
FIN_WAIT_2: Remote side acknowledged our FIN.
CLOSING: Both sides initiated close simultaneously.
TIME_WAIT: Segment lifetime enforcement; ensures remote ACK delivery.
CLOSE_WAIT: Remote side closed; local app must now close.
LAST_ACK: Local FIN sent after receiving remote FIN; waiting for final ACK.

g.text: RFC 9293: TCP Transmission Control Protocol State Machine
Events: [OPEN, SEND, RECEIVE, CLOSE, ABORT, STATUS] | Signals: [SYN, ACK, FIN, RST, timeout]
